title: Dry Bulk Coal Flows to China
section_path: Dry Bulk Coal Flows to China
section_path_text: Dry Bulk Coal Flows to China
summary:
Main
Dry Weekly Market Monitor - Week 13.2024 Snapshot of Spot Freight Rates, Supply-Demand Trends, Port Congestions March 27, 2024
Image reference: Screenshot 2024-03-27 16.11.23.png | assets/2024-03-27_dry-bulk-coal-flows-to-china_img_screenshot2024-03-27161123_fedf2352f79d.png
In the closing days of March, there has been a discernible softening of momentum in the Capesize Brazil to North China rates, following an upturn recorded in the previous week. Nevertheless, the recent momentum remains notably firmer than levels observed a month ago. Notably, the larger vessel size categories continue to exhibit strength, with a continued decrease in the number of ballasters for Capesize and Panamax vessels in Southeast Asia and Africa.

surge in its export volume compared to the previous year's lows, particularly noticeable in the
